instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Cinema on Saturday
task.initialEmail: Hi,||There’s a new adventure film at the cinema this Saturday. [1]Would you like to come with me?[/1]||[2]The film starts at 8 p.m. Is that too late for you?[/2]||[3]How should we get there?[/3] My parents can’t drive us because they’re busy.||[4]Do you want to invite anyone else?[/4]||Write soon||Sophie

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Sophie,||Thanks for inviting me. [1]Yes, I’d love to come with you on Saturday because the film sounds really exciting.[/1]||[2]No, eight o’clock isn’t too late for me, but I’ll need to ask my parents if they can pick me up afterwards.[/2]||[3]I think we should get there by bus. There’s one that stops near the cinema, and it isn’t expensive.[/3]||[4]Let’s invite Daniel too because he likes adventure films and he is always fun to be with.[/4]||See you soon,||Emma
